description: Worqen Escrow — devnet deployment manifest. Canonical source for the program ID, upgrade authority, Config PDA, and keypair paths used by CI/deploy scripts and off-chain services. worqen-escrow v1.0.0.

upgrade_authority.notes: Devnet deployer + upgrade authority (single key — fine for devnet). MAINNET MUST use a Squads multisig / HSM, never a file key. Transfer post-deploy with `solana program set-upgrade-authority`.

config.fee_recipient_note: Dedicated devnet treasury (keypair at ~/.config/solana/worqen-treasury.json, recoverable). Set via update_config. On MAINNET use a dedicated cold/receive-only or multisig wallet.
config.allowed_mints_note: USDC (4zMMC9...) and EURC (HzwqbKZw8...) devnet mints, set via scripts/bootstrap-config.ts. SOL is always allowed. USDT has no devnet mint (alias to USDC on devnet).

design.commission_model: fee-on-top: employer deposits amount + commission; the employee receives the full `amount`; commission is routed to the Config `fee_recipient` treasury (NOT the platform_authority signing key).

key_roles.config_authority: Config.authority — pause, allowlist, default fee, treasury (mainnet: multisig; two-step handoff via update_config+accept_authority)
key_roles.fee_recipient: treasury, receives all commission, never signs (cold)
key_roles.platform_authority: per-escrow hot ops key (backend): resolve disputes, force-release, auto-release

notes: New global Config PDA: mint allowlist, pause kill-switch (blocks only new create/deposit/direct-pay, never release/dispute/close), treasury fee_recipient, default commission. Instructions: init_config, update_config, accept_authority, add_allowed_mint, remove_allowed_mint.
Commission is now FEE-ON-TOP and routed to a dedicated treasury (fee_recipient), snapshotted per escrow at create — decoupled from the platform_authority signing key.
Tier-0 security fix: mandatory MINIMUM dispute window (3 days) so a worker can no longer self-dispute and instantly force-release; on-chain deadline bounded to [now+3d, now+90d].

Account additions: escrow_kind (u8), fee_recipient (Pubkey), terms_hash ([u8;32]), reserved ([u8;64]). Event additions: ref_id on EscrowReleased, fee_recipient/escrow_kind/terms_hash on EscrowCreated, ConfigUpdated + MintAllowlistChanged; DirectPaymentMade switched to fee-on-top fields.

Hardening: cancel events report actual remaining amounts; update_platform_authority rejects no-op rotation; close_unfunded_escrow_sol/_token reclaim rent on never-funded escrows; total_deposit() now returns a checked Result.

New error codes: 6034 DisputeWindowTooShort, 6035 MintNotAllowed, 6036 ProgramPaused, 6037 InvalidFeeRecipient, 6038 NoPendingAuthority, 6039 PendingAuthorityMismatch, 6040 EscrowWasFunded, 6041 MintAllowlistFull.
Built with host toolchain `stable` (repo pin 1.79.0 was too old for the dep tree); SBF program built with platform-tools 1.84.1.
Devnet smoke test green: config init, SOL escrow lifecycle with fee-on-top + treasury routing, and DisputeWindowTooShort enforcement.

Extended-flows upgrade: added deposit_more_sol/_token (top-up/retainer), batch_pay_with_commission_sol/_token (multi-recipient/team/referral), mutual_cancel_sol/_token (amicable settle, no dispute); release_partial_* now allowed in PendingRelease + employee self-draw when both confirmed. 33 instructions total. 15/15 devnet tests green.

Toolchain modernized: Agave/Solana CLI 4.0.0 (platform-tools 1.53), bun package manager + bun test, LiteSVM in-process test suite (34 tests incl. clock-warp auto-release), Cargo [lints] check-cfg. web3.js v1 retained (Anchor 0.32 client requirement).

constants.usdt_mint_devnet_note: Tether has no devnet mint; alias USDT->USDC on devnet.

post_deploy_checklist: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_ESCROW_PROGRAM_ID=6FtagT9Xm9b6eBHgDmxggam2KuiQbPYywUXnrs7B2gEJ in frontend .env; copy target/idl/worqen_escrow.json to the frontend.

Backend: add the Config PDA account to every create_escrow / pay_with_commission_* call; pass the new escrow_kind + terms_hash on create and ref_id on release/direct-pay; route commission expectations to fee_recipient.
Run update_config to set a real treasury fee_recipient, and add_allowed_mint for the stablecoin mints, before functional use.
MAINNET: fresh secure program keypair, declare_id + Anchor.toml updated, verified build (solana-verify), deploy with a Squads multisig as upgrade + config authority.
